features.headline: Everything You Need for Your Special Day
features.subheadline: From initial planning to the big day, NIKAHKU helps every step of the way.

items.title: Budget Management
items.description: Set your wedding budget with automatic allocation, real-time expense tracking, and clear visualizations.

items.title: Vendor Management
items.description: Find, compare, and manage all vendors — complete with add-ons, cost estimator calculator, and shareable estimate links.

items.title: Digital Invitation & RSVP
items.description: Create an elegant digital invitation page guests can open in any browser — complete with RSVP form, session selection, and real-time wishes.

items.title: Guest List
items.description: Manage guests with full details, attendance confirmation, grouping, and a personal invitation link per guest via NanoID.

items.title: WhatsApp Templates
items.description: Send invitations directly to guests' WhatsApp using customizable message templates — formal, casual, fun, Islamic, and more.

items.title: Souvenir Scanner
items.description: Scan guest QR codes on the wedding day to validate attendance and mark souvenir collection in real-time.

items.title: Gift Tracker
items.description: Record and manage wedding gifts in detail — from gifts to dowry, complete with purchase status.

items.title: Planning & Rundown
items.description: Monitor preparation progress with interactive Kanban board, structured timeline checklist, and wedding event rundown.

items.title: Couple Collaboration
items.description: Invite your partner to plan together. One account, two managers, one perfect wedding.

howItWorks.headline: 3 Steps to Your Dream Wedding
howItWorks.subheadline: Get started in minutes, not weeks.

steps.title: Create Account & Fill Details
steps.description: Sign up for free, enter your wedding date and basic info. Our system will customize templates for you.

steps.title: Set Budget, Vendors & Guests
steps.description: Set your total budget, allocate to each category, choose vendors, and add your guest list with digital invitations.

steps.title: Monitor & Enjoy the Process
steps.description: Use the checklist, rundown, and scanner on the big day. Send invitations via WhatsApp and track RSVPs in real-time.

testimonials.headline: Stories from Happy Couples
testimonials.subheadline: They've planned their dream wedding with NIKAHKU.

items.name: Rina & Andi
items.text: NIKAHKU really helped us manage our wedding budget. From being confused at first, now all expenses are neatly recorded and transparent.

items.name: Sari & Budi
items.text: The digital invitation feature is amazing! Guests can RSVP directly and receive a personal link via WhatsApp. Saved us so much time and paper.

items.name: Dina & Fajar
items.text: The souvenir scanner was a lifesaver on our wedding day. No more long queues or confusion about who already picked up their souvenir!

items.question: Is NIKAHKU free?
items.answer: Yes! NIKAHKU is completely free including digital invitations, RSVP, souvenir scanner, and WhatsApp templates. We believe every couple deserves organized wedding planning.

items.question: How does the digital invitation work?
items.answer: Once you enable RSVP, you get a public invitation link (e.g. nikahku.app/i/your-name). Guests can open it, find their name, fill in the RSVP, and leave wishes — all without logging in.

items.question: How do I send invitations via WhatsApp?
items.answer: On the Guests page, click the WhatsApp button next to a guest's name. Choose a message template (formal, casual, fun, Islamic, etc.), preview the message, and send it directly to their WhatsApp — complete with personal invitation link and RSVP code.

items.question: What is the Souvenir Scanner?
items.answer: The Souvenir Scanner is a feature for the wedding day. Staff open the scanner page on their phone, scan the QR code from a guest's invitation to verify attendance and mark souvenir collection in real-time. Manual NanoID input is also supported.

items.question: How do I invite my partner?
items.answer: After creating an account, you can invite your partner through the 'Invite Partner' feature on the dashboard. Just enter their email.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: Absolutely! We use Supabase with end-to-end encryption to keep your personal data secure. Privacy is our priority.

items.question: Can I access it from my phone?
items.answer: NIKAHKU is a PWA (Progressive Web App) that can be accessed from any browser and installed like a native app on your phone, including Safari on iPhone.

items.question: What's the difference between Free and Premium?
items.answer: The Free plan includes all features including digital invitations, RSVP, scanner, and WhatsApp templates. Premium gives unlimited access for guests, vendors, custom templates, detailed reports, and priority support.
